[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Aora learning modules v0.1 — Agroforestry + Supply Chain (md + PDF) for China pilot
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/285
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/aora/pull/1
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/286
  
  Details:
  Designed and shipped the two Aora learning modules Gary owes the China team (Mr. Cao / Jerri / Evan) for the July pilot. New repo TrueSightDAO/aora: Module 1 Agroforestry (Forest to Bean, exercises AF-1..AF-8) and Module 2 Supply Chain (Bean to Bar to You, SC-1..SC-8 ending in QR-provenance finale on the Agroverse QR + ledger stack). Each exercise is an atomic tagged unit (setting, senses, duration, materials, live + fallback versions across farm/kitchen/workshop/factory/warehouse) so any session engine can recompose them; big ideas phrased to pass the six-year-old test; SDG alignment per module; 90-min China salon session templates; EN canonical + zh-CN stubs for Jerri's team; scripts/build_pdfs.py (markdown+weasyprint) generating the China-proof PDF artifacts. Execution roadmap AORA_EXPERIENCE_PLAN.md committed to agentic_ai_context with resume tracker (next: exercises.json + session generator at experience.agroverse.shop). PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/285 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/aora/pull/1 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/286
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
